name: Jellyfin Last.fm Plugin
description: Scrobble your music to Last.fm, update now playing status, and love/ban tracks directly from Jellyfin.
overview: Integrates Jellyfin with Last.fm for automatic scrobbling, now playing notifications, and track management (love/ban).
changelog:
- v10.9.0: Rewritten for Jellyfin 10.10+ with .NET 9 support
- Automatic scrobbling with configurable threshold
- Now playing notifications to Last.fm
- Love/Ban/Unlove track support via API
- Auto-love liked tracks option
- Configurable: scrobble %, min duration, album artist
- Multi-session playback tracking
